data.body:
for each surface, add support for verification steps
- create beat lightbox -list of strings.  make it easy to navigate without clicking o nthe mouse.  must be able to add/remove items from the list.
- beat detail -list of strings.  make it easy to navigate without clicking o nthe mouse.  must be able to add/remove items from the list.
- queues and active screens when active row - add another column to the "overview" component of the row
- scope refinement - update prompt to include acceptance criteria
data.title: Support Verification Steps for knots backed beats
